'''pakozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nyctophobia|nyctophobia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-k-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nyctophobia|nyctophobia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pakozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || pækezheth || pækezhej || pækezhesh || pækezhe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || pakokozhoth || pakokozhoj || pakokozhosh || pakokozho
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || pakozhoth || pakozhoj || pakozhosh || pakozho
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || pakofzhofth || pakofzhofj || pakofzhofsh || pakofzhof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || pakozhotho || pakozhojo || pakozhosho || pakozhoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || pakozhoth || pakozhoj || pakozhosh || pakozho
|-
| [[Possessive]] || pakozhothol || pakozhojol || pakozhoshol || pakozhokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || pakozhoothotho || pakozhoojojo || pakozhooshosho || pakozhooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || pakozhothon || pakozhojon || pakozhoshon || pakozhokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || pakozhothooro || pakozhojooro || pakozhoshooro || pakozhokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
